headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $122
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $120 to $122.
